level_signals: Lead development of key features from requirements definition through delivery
Collaborate with clients and engineering teams autonomously

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Prior product management experience, ideally with data platforms or engineering products.
must_haves.qualifier: ideally with data platforms or engineering products

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Proficient in data lake house technology and data workflows.
Technical skills in SQL, Python, and data engineering concepts.
Proven track record to handle data-intensive product development and client-facing requirements.
Excellent communication and cross-functional collaboration skills.
Applicants must have, and maintain, the right to work in the United Kingdom from the first day of employment.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Hands-on experience with Databricks or similar data platforms.
Familiarity with financial services platforms like Addepar.
Preferred experience with a scrum-based agile development process.

explicitly_excluded: Visa sponsorship is not available for this role

scope.surface: Data lake house as-a-service product for Addepar clients; advanced analytics and data sharing capabilities
scope.business_model: B2B enterprise SaaS, wealth management / investment data platform
primary_metrics_inferred: Client adoption of data lakehouse product
Performance and scalability of data platform
core_responsibilities: Develop and implement the product vision for a data lake house product customized to meet the needs of Addepar clients.
Collaborate with clients to determine data engineering and analytical needs.
Lead development of key features from requirements definition through delivery.
Work closely with Data Engineers and Data Scientists to ensure flawless performance and scalability.
Manage the full product development lifecycle from conceptualization to launch, focusing on continuous improvement.
Ensure the product remains competitive by staying current with trends in data lake house technologies.
Regularly communicate updates to collaborators and gather customer feedback.

Role has direct client-facing ownership and influence
Explicit equal opportunity employer statement and accommodation policy
red_flags: No visa sponsorship available — restricts candidates without existing UK work authorization
Location/office policy not specified beyond UK requirement; unclear if hybrid or fully onsite
Years of experience not specified, making seniority expectations ambiguous
